fa-cloud-rainbow.appearanceId: cloud shape with a rainbow arc above it

fa-cloud-showers.appearanceId: cloud shape with a few downward rain drop lines below
fa-cloud-showers.functionalityId: display light rain or shower forecast

fa-cloud-showers-heavy.appearanceId: cloud shape with many dense downward rain lines below
fa-cloud-showers-heavy.functionalityId: display heavy rain or downpour forecast
fa-cloud-showers-heavy.intentId: check severe or heavy rainfall conditions

fa-cloud-showers-water.appearanceId: cloud shape with downward rain lines ending in water droplets below
fa-cloud-showers-water.functionalityId: display rain accumulation or water forecast

fa-cloud-slash.appearanceId: cloud shape with a diagonal slash line through it
fa-cloud-slash.intentId: turn off or indicate unavailable cloud access

fa-cloud-sleet.appearanceId: cloud shape with alternating rain and snowflake elements below
fa-cloud-sleet.functionalityId: display sleet or mixed precipitation forecast
fa-cloud-sleet.intentId: check mixed rain and snow weather conditions

fa-cloud-snow.appearanceId: cloud shape with snowflake pattern below
fa-cloud-snow.functionalityId: display snowfall or winter weather forecast
fa-cloud-snow.intentId: check snow or winter storm conditions

fa-cloud-sun.appearanceId: cloud shape with sun partially behind it

fa-cloud-sun-rain.appearanceId: cloud with sun partially behind it and rain drop lines below
fa-cloud-sun-rain.functionalityId: display partly cloudy with rain forecast
fa-cloud-sun-rain.intentId: check mixed sun and rain weather conditions

fa-cloud-upload.appearanceId: cloud shape with an upward-pointing arrow inside or above it
fa-cloud-upload.functionalityId: upload a file to cloud storage
fa-cloud-upload.intentId: save or sync content to the cloud

fa-cloud-word.appearanceId: cloud shape containing small horizontal text lines or word marks
fa-cloud-word.functionalityId: open or view a cloud-based word document
fa-cloud-word.intentId: access a text document stored in the cloud

fa-cloud-xmark.appearanceId: cloud shape with an X mark inside it
fa-cloud-xmark.functionalityId: remove or cancel a cloud item
fa-cloud-xmark.intentId: delete or reject a cloud-stored file

fa-clouds-moon.appearanceId: two overlapping cloud shapes with a crescent moon partially visible behind

fa-clouds-sun.appearanceId: two overlapping cloud shapes with a sun partially behind them
fa-clouds-sun.intentId: check mixed clouds and sun weather conditions

fa-code.appearanceId: left and right angle bracket chevrons with a forward slash between them
fa-code.intentId: access or toggle a code view

fa-coffee.appearanceId: filled cup or mug with steam lines rising above it
fa-coffee.functionalityId: indicate a break or coffee-related action
fa-coffee.intentId: take a break or access a cafe feature

fa-coffee-bean.appearanceId: oval bean shape with a central crease line
fa-coffee-bean.functionalityId: represent or select a coffee bean item
fa-coffee-bean.intentId: browse or identify a coffee ingredient

fa-coffee-beans.appearanceId: two oval bean shapes with central crease lines, slightly overlapping
fa-coffee-beans.functionalityId: represent or browse coffee bean options

fa-coffee-pot.appearanceId: tall pot body with a spout, handle, and lid on top
fa-coffee-pot.functionalityId: represent or access a coffee brewing function
fa-coffee-pot.intentId: browse coffee-making or kitchen appliance options

fa-comment.appearanceId: rounded rectangular speech bubble with pointer tail at bottom-left
fa-comment.intentId: add or view a comment on an item

fa-comment-arrow-down.appearanceId: rounded rectangular speech bubble with a downward arrow inside
fa-comment-arrow-down.functionalityId: scroll down or download a comment thread
fa-comment-arrow-down.intentId: view comments below or load more replies

fa-comment-arrow-up.appearanceId: rounded rectangular speech bubble with an upward arrow inside
fa-comment-arrow-up.functionalityId: scroll up or submit a comment
fa-comment-arrow-up.intentId: post or navigate upward in a comment thread

fa-comment-arrow-up-right.appearanceId: rounded rectangular speech bubble with a diagonal arrow pointing up-right inside
fa-comment-arrow-up-right.functionalityId: share or forward a comment externally
fa-comment-arrow-up-right.intentId: send a comment to an external destination

fa-comments.appearanceId: two overlapping rounded rectangular speech bubbles with pointer tails
fa-comments.functionalityId: open a conversation or chat thread
fa-comments.intentId: view or start a multi-person discussion

fa-compass.appearanceId: circular compass rose with N/S/E/W markers and needle
fa-compass.intentId: find direction or navigate to a location

fa-compass-drafting.appearanceId: drafting compass with two pointed legs forming a V shape
fa-compass-drafting.functionalityId: access drawing or precision design tools
fa-compass-drafting.intentId: use drafting or technical design features

fa-compass-slash.appearanceId: circular compass rose with a diagonal slash line through it
fa-compass-slash.intentId: indicate navigation is unavailable or blocked

fa-compress.appearanceId: four inward-pointing corner arrows converging toward center
fa-compress.intentId: exit fullscreen or reduce content to smaller size

fa-cookie.appearanceId: round circle shape with multiple small dot chips scattered across it
fa-cookie.intentId: view or configure cookie consent settings

fa-cookie-bite.appearanceId: round circle shape with dot chips and a curved bite chunk missing from edge
fa-cookie-bite.functionalityId: manage cookies or indicate a consumed item
fa-cookie-bite.intentId: review cookie usage or a partially consumed treat

fa-copy.intentId: duplicate text, a file, or an element

fa-corn.appearanceId: elongated ear of corn with husk leaves at bottom and kernel rows along the body
fa-corn.functionalityId: represent or select a corn food item
fa-corn.intentId: browse or label a corn-related ingredient

fa-cow.appearanceId: side-profile cow silhouette with body, legs, head, horns, and udder
fa-cow.intentId: browse farm animals or dairy-related content

fa-credit-card.appearanceId: horizontal rectangular card with a stripe or chip and horizontal lines on lower half
fa-credit-card.functionalityId: enter or manage payment card details
fa-credit-card.intentId: pay for something using a credit or debit card

fa-croissant.appearanceId: curved crescent-shaped pastry with pointed ends and layered texture
fa-croissant.functionalityId: represent or select a pastry or bakery item
fa-croissant.intentId: browse breakfast or bakery food options

fa-crop.appearanceId: two L-shaped corner brackets forming a crop frame
fa-crop.functionalityId: crop or trim an image or canvas
fa-crop.intentId: adjust the boundaries of an image or media

fa-crosshairs.appearanceId: circle with cross lines through center, targeting reticle
fa-crosshairs.functionalityId: target or pinpoint a location or element
fa-crosshairs.intentId: aim at or precisely select a specific point

fa-crow.appearanceId: side-profile bird silhouette with wings, tail, beak, and perched feet
fa-crow.functionalityId: represent a crow or bird category

fa-d.functionalityId: label or filter with letter D
fa-d.intentId: access or mark a D-categorized item

fa-database.appearanceId: stacked horizontal cylinders representing data storage
fa-database.intentId: access stored data or database settings

fa-desktop.appearanceId: wide rectangular monitor screen on a short stand with a base
fa-desktop.functionalityId: view or manage a desktop application
fa-desktop.intentId: access desktop or computer display settings

fa-desktop-arrow-down.appearanceId: wide rectangular monitor screen with a downward arrow overlaid or inside
fa-desktop-arrow-down.functionalityId: download content to a desktop device
fa-desktop-arrow-down.intentId: save or sync content to the local computer

fa-diagram-cells.appearanceId: grid of rectangular cells arranged in rows and columns
fa-diagram-cells.functionalityId: view or edit a cell-based diagram or table
fa-diagram-cells.intentId: organize or inspect data in a grid layout

fa-diagram-lean-canvas.appearanceId: rectangular canvas divided into multiple labeled smaller rectangular sections
fa-diagram-lean-canvas.functionalityId: open or edit a lean canvas business diagram
fa-diagram-lean-canvas.intentId: plan or review a business model structure

fa-diagram-nested.appearanceId: rectangles nested inside one another in concentric box arrangement
fa-diagram-nested.functionalityId: view or edit a nested hierarchy diagram
fa-diagram-nested.intentId: explore layered or nested structural relationships

fa-diagram-next.appearanceId: two boxes connected by a rightward arrow indicating sequence
fa-diagram-next.functionalityId: navigate to the next step in a diagram
fa-diagram-next.intentId: advance forward through a process or workflow

fa-diagram-predecessor.appearanceId: two boxes connected by a leftward arrow indicating prior dependency
fa-diagram-predecessor.functionalityId: view the predecessor step in a diagram
fa-diagram-predecessor.intentId: trace back to an earlier step or dependency

fa-diagram-previous.appearanceId: two boxes connected by a leftward arrow indicating sequence going back
fa-diagram-previous.functionalityId: navigate to the previous step in a diagram
fa-diagram-previous.intentId: go back to the prior step in a workflow
